tool: Stream Bandit Code Labs Assistant Workbench
purpose: Assistant-side operating map for GitHub, Code Labs V104 and Supabase. This is built so ChatGPT can do more of the scan/work itself and Trevor does not need to copy code manually.

code_labs_assistant_latest_files.purpose: Latest saved Code Labs file summary per filename: repo, site, mode, filename, hash, character count, line count, preview and timestamps.
code_labs_assistant_latest_files.full_code_source: public.code_labs_files.current_code when needed through controlled Supabase connector query

code_labs_assistant_recent_activity.purpose: Unified assistant-readable activity stream from Code Labs projects, files, jobs, tests and audit rows.

primary_reads: Code_Labs_V104.get_code_labs_context for latest saved projects, jobs, packets, tests and audit
Supabase select from public.code_labs_assistant_latest_files for latest saved file summaries
Supabase select from public.code_labs_assistant_recent_activity for recent Code Labs activity
primary_writes: GitHub branch + PR + merge after scan
Supabase only for Code Labs support metadata and assistant-readable views when explicitly useful

assistant_preferred_flow: Read assistant workbench map from GitHub.
Read Supabase assistant latest files/activity views.
Decide page/pass/PR path without asking Trevor to paste code unless all connector reads fail.
Open one controlled branch for each real change.
Merge only when scope is small and safe.
do_not_touch_without_reason: social pages unless social pass is active

next_real_upgrade.name: Code Labs current selection autosync
next_real_upgrade.goal: Make Code Labs browser state autosave the currently selected file/path/hash into existing Code Labs history or a narrow support row so ChatGPT can read it through Code Labs V104/Supabase views.
next_real_upgrade.preferred_method: Use existing code_labs_files/history save path and assistant latest-files view; avoid new app-facing Stream Bandit schema.
next_real_upgrade.fallback_method: Add a Code Labs-only support table/view after confirming RLS and security_invoker behavior.
